title: Panchshil Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Panchshil Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Panchshil Realty has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Panchshil Realty:
Panchshil Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty!
